title: astragalus leptostachys
intro: Astragalus leptostachys, also known as Chinese milk vetch or four-angled milk vetch, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus leptostachys include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue and stress, and improving respiratory health. Astragalus leptostachys is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to create a formula that can be used to support overall well-being.
